structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Zone Temperature and Damper Control - Cooling Mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is cooling, the Cooling Loop output resets the active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum to cooling maximum. The cold duct damper modulates to maintain measured cold duct airflow at setpoint. The hot duct damper is closed. If cold duct supply air temperature is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Cooling Loop output resets active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. Cold duct damper modulated to maintain measured cold duct airflow at active setpoint. Hot duct damper closed. If cold duct SAT > room temperature, active cold duct airflow setpoint ≤ minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is cooling, the Cooling Loop output shall reset the active cold duct airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed. If cold duct supply air temperature from air handler is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is cooling, the Cooling Loop output shall reset the active cold duct airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed. If cold duct supply air temperature from air handler is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Zone Temperature and Damper Control - Deadband Mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint is set to the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper modulates to maintain measured cold duct airflow at setpoint. The hot duct damper is closed.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Active cold duct airflow setpoint = minimum endpoint. Cold duct damper modulated to maintain measured cold duct airflow at setpoint. Hot duct damper closed.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Zone Temperature and Damper Control - Heating Mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is heating, the Heating Loop output resets the active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to heating maximum. The hot duct damper modulates to maintain measured hot duct airflow at setpoint. The active cold duct airflow setpoint is the minimum endpoint and the cooling damper modulates to maintain measured cold duct airflow at that setpoint. If hot duct SAT is less than room temperature, the hot duct damper is closed.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Heating Loop output resets active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to heating maximum endpoint. Hot duct damper modulated to maintain measured hot duct airflow at setpoint. Active cold duct airflow setpoint = minimum endpoint; cooling damper modulated to maintain measured cold duct airflow at setpoint. If hot duct SAT < room temperature, hot duct damper closed.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is heating: 1. The Heating Loop output shall reset the active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to heating maximum endpoint. The hot duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured hot duct airflow at the active hot duct airflow setpoint. 2. The active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cooling damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at active cold duct airflow setpoint. 3. If hot duct supply air temperature from the air handler is less than room temperature, the hot duct damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is heating: 1. The Heating Loop output shall reset the active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to heating maximum endpoint. The hot duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured hot duct airflow at the active hot duct airflow setpoint. 2. The active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cooling damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at active cold duct airflow setpoint. 3. If hot duct supply air temperature from the air handler is less than room temperature, the hot duct damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Override Logic to Avoid Backflow
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Overriding Section 5.14.5.1 Logic (to Avoid Backflow from One Duct to the Other)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed. If the cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper shall be closed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Heating air handler not proven ON OR cooling air handler not proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: If heating air handler not proven ON, close heating damper. If cooling air handler not proven ON, close cooling damper.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed. If cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed. If cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm - 70% of Setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm - 50% of Setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm Suppression for Zero Importance-Multiplier Zones
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Zone Importance-Multiplier = 0 for static pressure reset T&R loop
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Sensor Calibration Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the fan serving the zone is off and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Fan OFF and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of max airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is off and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is off and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Damper Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If damper position is 0% and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Damper position = 0% and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of cooling max airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes while fan proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides for Dual-Duct VAV
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; force cooling damper full closed/open; force heating damper full closed/open; and reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Verify software switches exist to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; force cooling damper full closed/open; force heating damper full closed/open; and reset request-hours accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, e. force cooling damper full closed/open, f. force heating damper full closed/open, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, e. force cooling damper full closed/open, f. force heating damper full closed/open, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT Reset Requests - High Deviation
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes after suppression period, send 3 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone temperature > cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes after suppression period per Section 5.1.20
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests.

evidence_quote: If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT Reset Requests - Moderate Deviation
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Else if zone temperature exceeds cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes after suppression period, send 2 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Active endpoints used in the control logic
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Active endpoints vary by Zone Group mode: Occupied uses Vcool-max, Vmin*, Vheat-max; Cooldown uses Vcool-max; Setup uses Vcool-max; Warmup uses Vheat-max; Setback uses Vheat-max; Unoccupied uses 0 for all.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Table 5.14.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode: Setpoint: Cooling maximum, Minimum, Heating maximum. Occupied: Vcool-max, Vmin*, Vheat-max. Cooldown: Vcool-max, 0, 0. Setup: Vcool-max, 0, 0. Warmup: 0, 0, Vheat-max. Setback: 0, 0, Vheat-max. Unoccupied: 0, 0, 0.

evidence_quote: Table 5.14.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode: Setpoint: Cooling maximum, Minimum, Heating maximum. Occupied: Vcool-max, Vmin*, Vheat-max. Cooldown: Vcool-max, 0, 0. Setup: Vcool-max, 0, 0. Warmup: 0, 0, Vheat-max. Setback: 0, 0, Vheat-max. Unoccupied: 0, 0, 0.
